# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.

Prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data with security controls

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    Description: EC2 instance type
  
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: EC2 Key Pair for SSH access
  
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC ID where instances will be launched
  
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet ID for instance placement
  
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI
  
  DataVolumeSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 20
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: Size of EBS data volume in GB

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/8
          Description: SSH access from internal network only
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/8
          Description: HTTPS access from internal network only
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTPS outbound for updates
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstanceSecurityGroup

  InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EBSEncryptionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                  - kms:CreateGrant
                Resource: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstanceRole

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref InstanceRole

  EBSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for EBS volume encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow EC2 to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:CreateGrant
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub ec2.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com

  EBSEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/application-ebs-encryption
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EBSEncryptionKey

  ApplicationInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
            KmsKeyId: !Ref EBSEncryptionKey
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        InstanceMetadataTags: enabled
      Monitoring: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstance
        - Key: BackupPolicy
          Value: Daily

  DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt ApplicationInstance.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: gp3
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref EBSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationDataVolume
        - Key: BackupPolicy
          Value: Daily
    DeletionPolicy: Snapshot
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Snapshot

  DataVolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref ApplicationInstance
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume

  BackupVault:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupVault
    Properties:
      BackupVaultName: ApplicationBackupVault
      EncryptionKeyArn: !GetAtt BackupEncryptionKey.Arn

  BackupEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for backup vault encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow AWS Backup to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:CreateGrant
            Resource: '*'

  BackupPlan:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupPlan
    Properties:
      BackupPlan:
        BackupPlanName: ApplicationBackupPlan
        BackupPlanRule:
          - RuleName: DailyBackup
            TargetBackupVault: !Ref BackupVault
            ScheduleExpression: cron(0 2 * * ? *)
            StartWindowMinutes: 60
            CompletionWindowMinutes: 120
            Lifecycle:
              DeleteAfterDays: 30
              MoveToColdStorageAfterDays: 7

  BackupRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForBackup
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForRestores

  BackupSelection:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupSelection
    Properties:
      BackupPlanId: !Ref BackupPlan
      BackupSelection:
        SelectionName: ApplicationResourceSelection
        IamRoleArn: !GetAtt BackupRole.Arn
        Resources:
          - !Sub arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:volume/${DataVolume}
        Conditions:
          StringEquals:
            - ConditionKey: aws:ResourceTag/BackupPolicy
              ConditionValue: Daily

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID
    Value: !Ref ApplicationInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId
  
  DataVolumeId:
    Description: Data Volume ID
    Value: !Ref DataVolume
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-DataVolumeId
  
  PrivateIp:
    Description: Private IP address
    Value: !GetAtt ApplicationInstance.PrivateIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-PrivateIp
  
  EncryptionKeyId:
    Description: KMS Key ID for EBS encryption
    Value: !Ref EBSEncryptionKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-EncryptionKeyId
  
  BackupVaultName:
    Description: Backup Vault Name
    Value: !Ref BackupVault
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-BackupVaultName
